steps.title: Identify the transformation
steps.content: The work progresses from “irregular and misty outline” to having “distincter grace and beauty.” This shows the work is developing—coming to have new qualities—through the carving process.

steps.title: Match the verb to the progression
steps.content:
The work “acquired” greater precision—meaning it came to have or took on this quality as Drowne carved it, which is exactly what “assumed” means.

The other choices don't fit: “acknowledged” means to recognize, “imitated” means to copy, and “speculated” means to guess—none describe how an object becomes more refined.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
